title: IaC Configuration Manifest
description: Fully resolved parameter set for a single IaC artifact. Every parameter must declare its source so that downstream agents and humans can audit where each value came from.

ir_source.description: S3 key of the IR JSON file this manifest was derived from.

parameters.description: Flat list of every resolved parameter for the IaC output.

parameter.description: Dot-notation Terraform resource address matching the fully qualified parameter path, e.g. 'aws_instance.web_server.instance_type'.

value.description: The resolved value for this parameter. May be any JSON type.

x-enum-descriptions.user_provided: The user explicitly specified this value in their request.
x-enum-descriptions.agent_default: The agent chose this value based on best practices. See reasoning field.
x-enum-descriptions.parsed: The value was extracted directly from the source diagram.

reasoning.description: Required when source is 'agent_default': plain English explanation of why this value was chosen and what alternatives were considered. Must be null when source is 'user_provided' or 'parsed'.
